title: The Primary Dental Services Statement of Financial Entitlements (Amendment) (No.2) Directions 2025
body: "The dental recruitment incentive scheme (DRIS) offers a financial incentive to attract dentists to commit to work in parts of England that are struggling to recruit NHS dentists.  The DRIS applies to integrated care boards and dental practices providing NHS services in England who are facing recruitment and retention challenges.  These directions set out the conditions attached to the scheme.  "
